statements.impact_statement: Fix is present in the main branch (commit 4b9b399dad25, 2026-05-18). The advisory records the fix in release 25.3.1; nightly CI builds embed a Go pseudo-version (v25.0.0-YYYYMMDDHHMMSS-<commit>) that sorts below that tag, causing Trivy to false-positive.
Fix is present in the main branch. The advisory records the fix in release 25.3.2; nightly CI builds embed a Go pseudo-version that sorts below that tag.
Fix is present in the main branch. The advisory records the fix in release 25.3.3; nightly CI builds embed a Go pseudo-version that sorts below that tag.
Fix is present in the main branch. The advisory database has not yet recorded a fixed version, so Trivy cannot determine this by version comparison alone.
Fix is present in the main branch. The advisory database has not yet recorded a fixed version, so Trivy cannot determine this by version comparison alone.
